dashboard.label: Mini SOC Security Operations Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-Time Infrastructure Protection & Risk Scoring Framework (MikroTik CHR Perimeter Log Source)

search.query: index=mikrotik src_ip=* | stats count by src_ip | sort -count | head 10
index=mikrotik dst_port=* | stats count by dst_port | sort -count | head 10

index=mikrotik alert_type=* | eval attack_category=case( alert_type IN ("PORT-SCAN-DETECTED","PORT-SCAN-BLOCKED"), "Reconnaissance", alert_type IN ("SSH-BRUTEFORCE-DETECTED","SSH-BRUTEFORCE-BLOCKED"), "Brute Force", alert_type IN ("ICMP-FLOOD-DETECTED"), "Denial of Service", alert_type IN ("FW-VIOLATION-TELNET","FW-VIOLATION-FTP","FW-VIOLATION-WWW","FW-VIOLATION-API","FW-VIOLATION-WINBOX"), "Policy Violation", alert_type IN ("FW-DEFAULT-DROP"), "Unclassified/Other", 1=1, "Other" ) | stats count by attack_category | sort -count
index=mikrotik alert_type=* | timechart span=1m count by alert_type

chart.title: 5. Firewall Aggregated Drop & Block Events Trend

search.query: index=mikrotik alert_type=*DROP* OR alert_type=*BLOCKED* OR alert_type=*VIOLATION* | timechart span=5m count by alert_type

chart.title: 6. SSH Credential Access Brute Force Matrix (Port 22)

search.query: index=mikrotik ("failed" OR "BRUTEFORCE" OR "PORT-SCAN-BLOCKED") dst_port=22 | stats count by src_ip | sort -count
index=mikrotik alert_type="ICMP-FLOOD-DETECTED" "firewall,info" | timechart span=10s count by src_ip
index=mikrotik alert_type IN ("FW-VIOLATION-TELNET", "FW-VIOLATION-FTP", "FW-VIOLATION-WWW", "FW-VIOLATION-API", "FW-VIOLATION-WINBOX") | stats count by src_ip, dst_port, alert_type | sort -count

table.title: 9. Host Risk Score Metric & Vulnerability Level (Live Dynamic Scoring)

search.query: index=mikrotik alert_type=* | `get_severity` | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk_score, dc(alert_type) as jenis_serangan, count as total_event by src_ip | eval risk_level=case( total_risk_score>=30, "CRITICAL", total_risk_score>=16, "HIGH", total_risk_score>=6, "MEDIUM", total_risk_score<6, "LOW" ) | sort -total_risk_score | table src_ip, total_event, jenis_serangan, total_risk_score, risk_level
